cases.description: Standard quarterly review summary from clean advisor notes.

input.advisor_meeting_notes: Met with both spouses for 45 min. Reviewed last quarter statement; no questions. Clients reiterated intent to increase monthly contributions starting January 2027. Asked about education funding for two children (9, 12); I said we would gather info and revisit. Older child may attend private high school in 2 years. Next steps: I will send info-needs list; clients will share budget snapshot.

cases.expected_behavior: Produces schema-valid output with grounded summary, action items per side, and a tax-adjacency flag on the education-funding topic.

cases.description: Notes contain client-uttered performance and guarantee language. Prompt must flag, not repeat as advice.

input.advisor_meeting_notes: Client said friend's portfolio outperformed theirs last year. Asked about guaranteed-return products; I deferred. Asked about tax filing assistance; I will refer to their tax professional.

cases.expected_behavior: Three review flags emitted (performance comparison, guarantee inquiry, tax). CRM note records the conversation without endorsing any sensitive phrase.

cases.description: Sparse advisor notes — must produce a conservative summary and flag the sparsity.

input.advisor_meeting_notes: 15 min check-in. Client is well. Will revisit at next review.

cases.expected_behavior: Produces a short, accurate summary with empty arrays where appropriate and a review flag about sparse notes.

cases.description: Notes contain action items for both advisor and client; output must assign owners correctly.

input.advisor_meeting_notes: I will send a household-cashflow worksheet by Friday. Client will gather last 3 months of statements. Operations team to update mailing address.

cases.expected_behavior: Three action items with owners advisor / client / operations. CRM note reflects all three.

cases.description: Client asked 'am I invested correctly for retirement.' Prompt must record the question without answering it.

input.advisor_meeting_notes: Client asked whether they are invested correctly for retirement. I did not opine and said we would revisit at a planning meeting.

cases.expected_behavior: Records the question as a concern, action item to schedule a planning meeting, and a review flag for suitability-adjacent language.

cases.description: Notes contain account-number-like string. Output must not echo it.

input.advisor_meeting_notes: Reviewed account ending in 4421. Client confirmed contact info on file. Will discuss beneficiary designations next time.

cases.expected_behavior: Summary references 'the reviewed account' without echoing the digits. Beneficiary follow-up captured as an action item.
